schedule.description: Story 1 — Season finale, West No. 3 at stake
Story 1 — 15 final games, playoff seeding drama
Story 2 — SGA back-to-back MVP season wrap

stories.title: NBA Regular Season Finale — 15 Games, West No. 3 Seed on the Line

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
THE FINAL DAY IS HERE.

15 NBA games. One day. Everything still to play for.

West No. 3 seed: Nuggets (53-28) vs. Lakers (52-28) — separated by HALF a game.

Play-In starts Tuesday. Playoffs start April 18. #HoopHeroes #NBA

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Nuggets host the Spurs. Lakers host Utah.

Half a game. One day. The No. 3 seed in the West — and the playoff bracket — gets decided TODAY.

The regular season goes out with a bang. #MileHighBasketball #LakeShow #HoopHeroes

article.headline: NBA Regular Season Finale: West No. 3 Seed Goes Down to the Wire

stories.title: SGA's Case for Back-to-Back MVP — A Season for the Record Books

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
31.6 PPG. 6.5 ast. 64 wins.

Shai Gilgeous-Alexander just finished one of the great seasons in NBA history.

Back-to-back scoring titles. Back-to-back MVP. The Thunder are the best team in basketball. #ThunderUp #HoopHeroes #NBA

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
88 of 100 first-place MVP votes for SGA.

The Thunder went from rebuilding to No. 1 seed in 3 seasons.

This is one of the best individual and team turnarounds in NBA history. #ThunderUp #HoopHeroes

article.headline: Back-to-Back: SGA's Historic Season Makes Him the Obvious MVP Choice

stories.title: 2026 NBA Playoff Bracket — Complete First-Round Preview

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
The 2026 NBA Playoffs start April 18.

East: Pistons, Celtics, Knicks, Cavs locked in.
West: Thunder, Spurs locked. Nuggets/Lakers fighting for No. 3.

This bracket is LOADED. No easy out. #HoopHeroes #NBAPlayoffs

stories.title: Wembanyama Locks Up DPOY — A Historic Defensive Season

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Victor Wembanyama's DPOY odds: -5000.

That's not a lock. That's a formality.

He played through a rib injury to stay eligible. Leads the league in blocks. Changed how we think about rim protection. #GoSpursGo #HoopHeroes #NBA

article.headline: 265 Threes: Kon Knueppel's Rookie Record Season Changes the Conversation

stories.title: Kon Knueppel Shatters NBA Rookie 3-Point Record — 265 and Counting

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Kon Knueppel: 265 three-pointers made as a ROOKIE.

The old record? 206 — set by Keegan Murray in 2022-23.

Knueppel didn't just break it. He shattered it by 59. 43% from three. ROY. #BuzzCity #HoopHeroes #NBA

stories.title: SoFi Play-In Tournament Preview — April 14-17 on Prime Video

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
The 2026 SoFi Play-In Tournament starts TUESDAY.

West: No. 7 Suns vs. No. 8 (Blazers/Clippers) — 10 PM ET on Prime Video
East: No. 7 vs. No. 8 — 7:30 PM ET on Prime Video

Win or go home. Let's go. #HoopHeroes #NBAPlayoffs

stories.title: NBA Awards Season — ROY, Sixth Man, Coach of the Year

x_posts.label: Post 7
x_posts.text:
Regular season ends TODAY. Award season begins NOW.

MVP: SGA (back-to-back)
DPOY: Wembanyama (-5000)
ROY: Kon Knueppel (265 rookie 3s)
COY: Mark Daigneault (OKC, 64 wins)

Agree? Disagree? #HoopHeroes #NBA #NBAawards
